---
title: "DataSynthesizer Widget"
description: "GUI widget for interactive data synthesis"
---

## Overview

The `DataSynthesizer_Widget` provides a dockable GUI panel for generating synthetic data into `DataManager`. It uses the `DataSynthesizer` library's `GeneratorRegistry` to access available generators and their parameter schemas.

## Architecture

The widget follows the standard EditorState pattern with a view + properties split:

```
DataSynthesizer_Widget/
├── CMakeLists.txt
├── DataSynthesizerWidgetRegistration.hpp/cpp   # EditorRegistry registration
├── Core/
│   ├── DataSynthesizerStateData.hpp            # reflect-cpp POD struct
│   └── DataSynthesizerState.hpp/cpp            # EditorState subclass
└── UI/
    ├── DataSynthesizerProperties_Widget.hpp/cpp # Properties panel (right zone)
    └── DataSynthesizerView_Widget.hpp/cpp       # Preview panel (right zone)
```

### State (`DataSynthesizerState`)

Minimal `EditorState` subclass tracking:

- `instance_id` — unique widget instance identifier
- `display_name` — user-visible name ("Data Synthesizer")

Implements `toJson()` / `fromJson()` via reflect-cpp for workspace persistence.

### Properties Widget

Currently a placeholder `QWidget` with a label. Will be populated in Milestone 2b with:

- Output type combo (AnalogTimeSeries, DigitalEventSeries, etc.)
- Generator combo (SineWave, GaussianNoise, etc.)
- `AutoParamWidget` for generator-specific parameter editing
- Output key text field
- Generate button

### View Widget

Currently a placeholder `QWidget` with a label. Will embed an OpenGL preview widget (`SynthesizerPreviewWidget`) in Milestone 2c.

### Registration

Registered via `DataSynthesizerWidgetModule::registerTypes()` with:

- **Type ID**: `"DataSynthesizerWidget"`
- **Menu path**: View/Tools
- **Zone**: Right (both view and properties)
- **Single instance**: `allow_multiple = false`
- Uses `create_editor_custom` for coordinated view + properties creation

## Dependencies

- `Qt6::Widgets` — UI components
- `EditorState` — state management and registration
- `DataManager` — data storage target
- `reflectcpp` — state serialization

## See Also

- [GeneratorRegistry](GeneratorRegistry.qmd) — the generator registry API
- [ROADMAP](ROADMAP.md) — full development roadmap including Milestones 2b/2c
